title: Bosses'Rise Hide Dodge
description: A small addon to the Bosses'Rise mod that automatically hides the dodge roll icon when not in danger.
body:
A small addon to the Bosses'Rise mod that automatically hides the dodge roll icon (normally by the hotbar). It disappears after 3 seconds, or until there are not hostile enemies nearby.
![Hotbar Location](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d90f47b3cc71a9f3464f9365a3ba72384350564a.png)

The icon appears if the player: rolls, attacks a monster, is attacked by a monster, or changes their max roll count (by equipping armor).
